body_html:
yes

--- DKIESQ@aol.com wrote:

May I tell Peg to wire the gifts to the kids
accounts as she suggests?

Darren

Date: Thu, 08 Dec 2005 13:46:20 -0500
To: DKIESQ@aol.com
From: Peg Ugland pegu@naproperty.com
Subject: Transfers

Darren,
For the past several years, I have wired from LHW,
gifts to each of the
children's Bear Stearns accounts. This years amount
should be the same as
last year, $22,000 each. Please check with Jeffrey
to make sure it is OK
to do this again this year.
Thanks.
Peg
